questions.question: What is the primary goal of the Agile Framework?
options: A) To follow a predefined plan
B) To deliver working software in short cycles
questions.explanation: The Agile Framework focuses on delivering working software in short cycles (sprints) and emphasizes flexibility and collaboration.

questions.question: Which of the following is a key principle of the Waterfall Framework?
questions.explanation: The Waterfall Framework is a linear, phased approach to project management, with each phase building on the previous one.

questions.question: What is the main objective of the V-Model?
questions.explanation: The V-Model is a quality assurance approach that focuses on testing and validation at each stage of the development process.

questions.question: Which of the following is a key principle of the Prince2 Framework?
options: B) To manage risk and resources
D) To follow a rigid project plan
questions.explanation: Prince2 emphasizes the importance of managing risk and resources, as well as ensuring stakeholder engagement throughout the project lifecycle.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of the Scrum Framework?
options: A) To follow a predefined plan
B) To deliver working software in short cycles
questions.explanation: Scrum focuses on delivering working software in short cycles (sprints) and emphasizes teamwork, accountability, and iterative progress.
